ops.text: capt-hook general-pack comments hook (captain_hook/packs/general/comments.py) blocks any new Python file whose PEP 723 metadata fence exceeds 3 lines: Python comment runs never classify as docs, so `# /// script` + requires-python + dependencies + [tool.uv.sources] + `# ///` (5-6 lines of machine-read uv config, ~150 chars) trips the plain-comment 3-line budget with "Verbose comment". Hit three times writing tools/guides-deploy-keys.py in cc-skills; had to fall back to a 3-line fence + sys.path.insert bridge instead of the intended `[tool.uv.sources]` path dependency. Any fleet script with dependencies (e.g. genimage.py's 4-line fence) will re-trip on its next touched Write.
